plugins.name: cairn
plugins.description: Wires the cairn MCP server and a SessionStart hook that injects cairn's structural-tool guidance (reach for find_symbols / find_subtypes / find_supertypes / find_callers / find_callees / find_references / find_imports before grep on structural questions; tier3_status / completeness / hints for empty-result recovery) into the host's context at the start of every session.
